message:
refactor(store): remove unused sorted_members_asc helper

Remove the sorted_members_asc function which collected SortedSet entries
into a sorted Vec of (score, member) pairs. With the dual BTreeMap/HashMap
indexing restructure, sorted iteration is handled directly by the BTreeMap
score index, making this O(n log n) helper redundant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
